landing_page.audience.doctor_title: Spend less time on paperwork. More on patients.

landing_page.audience.patient_title: Your health, finally in one calm place.
landing_page.features.labs.body: New results land in one inbox, flagged, sortable, and ready to share with the patient.
landing_page.features.labs.title: Lab inbox
landing_page.features.portal.body: Patients see their visits, medications and results — and book the next appointment themselves.
landing_page.features.portal.title: Patient portal
landing_page.features.records.body: A single, structured chart — history, allergies, conditions, labs and visits — that travels with the patient.
landing_page.features.records.title: Unified patient records
landing_page.features.referrals.body: Send and receive referrals with full context — no more chasing PDFs across inboxes.
landing_page.features.referrals.title: Secure referrals
landing_page.features.rx.body: Write, sign and send prescriptions with built-in interaction checks and reusable templates.
landing_page.features.rx.title: Prescriptions
landing_page.features.scheduling.body: Conflict-free booking, telehealth links, and reminders that actually reduce no-shows.
landing_page.features.scheduling.title: Smart scheduling
landing_page.features.sub: A single platform replacing scattered spreadsheets, paper notes, and patchwork tools.
landing_page.features.title: Everything you need to run a practice — and feel cared for as a patient.
landing_page.final_cta.sub: Pick your portal and sign in — your data, your patients, your peace of mind.
landing_page.final_cta.title: Ready to feel the difference?
landing_page.footer.tagline: The modern clinical platform — secure, connected, calm.
landing_page.hero.lead: One secure workspace for doctors and patients — records, appointments, referrals, and lab results in a single, beautifully designed flow.
landing_page.hero.pill: Trusted by clinicians · HIPAA & GDPR ready
landing_page.how.step1.body: Doctors and patients each get a dedicated, secure workspace tailored to their role.
landing_page.how.step1.title: Sign in to your portal
landing_page.how.step2.body: Today's schedule, your inbox, urgent labs and recent activity — surfaced where you need them.
landing_page.how.step2.title: See everything at a glance
landing_page.how.step3.body: Document a visit, send a referral, share a result. Every action is captured and audit-logged.
landing_page.how.step3.title: Move care forward
landing_page.how.title: From first sign-in to a finished visit — in minutes.
landing_page.legal.cookies.body:
Altheon Connect uses a minimal set of cookies and similar storage technologies to keep you signed in, remember your language preference, and protect your account from abuse.

Essential cookies (such as the session token and CSRF cookie) cannot be disabled — they are required for the platform to function safely. We do not set advertising or third-party tracking cookies.

You can clear cookies at any time from your browser settings. Doing so will sign you out and reset display preferences. For questions or to exercise your rights under GDPR, contact privacy@altheonconnect.com.
landing_page.legal.cookies.title: Cookie policy
landing_page.legal.privacy.body:
Altheon Connect handles personal and clinical data with healthcare-grade care. We process only the information needed to provide the service — patient records, appointments, prescriptions, lab results, and account details — and we never sell or share this data with advertisers.

Data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest, hosted in the European Union, and isolated per practice. Access is gated by role-based permissions and every read or change is recorded in an immutable audit log.

You can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data at any time. For GDPR-related enquiries contact privacy@altheonconnect.com.
landing_page.legal.privacy.title: Privacy notice
landing_page.legal.terms.body:
By using Altheon Connect you agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes related to the delivery and management of healthcare. You are responsible for the accuracy of information you enter and for keeping your sign-in credentials confidential.

Altheon Connect is provided "as is". It is a clinical workflow tool — it does not replace professional medical judgement, and any decision about diagnosis or treatment remains with the treating clinician.

We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms or applicable law. These terms are governed by French law and may be updated; material changes will be announced in-app at least 14 days before they take effect.
landing_page.legal.terms.title: Terms of service
landing_page.ribbon.label: Trusted by clinics, hospitals & independent practices
landing_page.security.audit.body: Every access and change is logged — accountability without effort.
landing_page.security.audit.title: Full audit trail
landing_page.security.compliance.body: Designed around healthcare regulation and data-protection best practices.
landing_page.security.compliance.title: HIPAA & GDPR ready
landing_page.security.enc.body: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest with industry-standard ciphers.
landing_page.security.enc.title: End-to-end encryption
landing_page.security.rbac.body: Granular permissions ensure only the right eyes see each record.
landing_page.security.rbac.title: Role-based access
landing_page.security.sub: End-to-end encrypted, audit-logged, and built with healthcare regulations in mind from day one.
landing_page.security.title: Compliance-grade by default. No shortcuts.
